prediction_reason.历年位次与招生计划: 2021–2025年理科组（物理类）最低位次约11131→15476→14376→16678→17846，整体呈持续后移趋势，近4年累计后移约6700名；2025年基准位次约17846名，近2年每年后移约1000–1200名，下行趋势明显；该校在贵州省理科组招生计划2021–2022年均为52人，2023年54人，2024年59人，2025年57人；2026年计划大幅扩至88人，较2025年增加31人（+54.4%），扩招幅度显著，将明显降低录取竞争烈度，推动最低位次数字大幅后移。
prediction_reason.学校层次与声誉: 北京林业大学为211工程、双一流建设高校；软科中国大学排名2026年第83名，近年排名稳定在74–85区间，属全国中上游水平；2026年声誉评价偏负面，涉及师德师风相关舆情；抖音热度排名第51位（较热），短视频曝光量中等偏上；2024年曾出现陕西文科投档线异常信号，但贵州理科组未见明显断档记录；风景园林学为A+学科（全国顶尖），与该校农林特色高度一致，对相关专业报考有一定吸引力；但仅1个A-及以上学科，学科覆盖面较窄。
prediction_reason.专业热度与地域: 计算机类、电子信息/通信、电气工程等工科专业持续高热，与该校计算机类、电子信息等招生专业匹配，可能推高相关专业竞争；本省2026年普通高考总人数约299000人（较2025年297258人微增），物理类考生约208403人（较2025年207171人+0.6%），竞争略有加剧；北京林业大学位于北京市，地域吸引力强。
prediction_reason.预测结论: 综合历年位次持续后移趋势、2026年大幅扩招54.4%带来的竞争缓解、本省物理类考生微增0.6%以及学校211层次+北京地域的持续吸引力，在2025年基准17846名基础上，预计2026年最低位次将显著后移至约23618名，区间23118–24118名。

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plan
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum ranking for the Science Group (Physics Category) was approximately 11131 → 15476 → 14376 → 16678 → 17846, showing a continuous backward trend, with a cumulative backward shift of about 6700 positions in the past 4 years; the baseline ranking for 2025 is about 17846, with an annual backward shift of about 1000–1200 positions in the past 2 years, indicating a clear downward trend; the enrollment plan for this university in the Science Group of Guizhou Province was 52 students in 2021–2022, 54 in 2023, 59 in 2024, and 57 in 2025; the plan for 2026 significantly expands to 88 students, an increase of 31 students (+54.4%) compared to 2025, a substantial expansion that will significantly reduce admission competition and push the minimum ranking much further back.

学校层次与声誉.title: University Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: Beijing Forestry University is a 211 Project and Double First-Class university; it ranks 83rd in the 2026 Soft Science China University Rankings, with a stable ranking in the 74–85 range in recent years, placing it at the upper-middle level nationally; the reputation evaluation for 2026 is somewhat negative, involving public opinion related to teacher ethics; it ranks 51st in Douyin popularity (relatively hot), with medium-to-high short video exposure; in 2024, there was an abnormal signal in the Shaanxi Liberal Arts admission cut-off, but no obvious gap record in the Guizhou Science Group; Landscape Architecture is an A+ discipline (top nationally), highly consistent with the university's forestry characteristics, which has some appeal for related majors; however, there is only one A- or above discipline, indicating a narrow disciplinary coverage.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Location
专业热度与地域.text: Engineering majors such as Computer Science, Electronic Information/Communication, and Electrical Engineering remain highly popular, matching the university's enrollment majors like Computer Science and Electronic Information, which may increase competition for related majors; the total number of candidates for the 2026 Gaokao in this province is about 299,000 (slightly up from 297,258 in 2025), with about 208,403 Physics Category candidates (up 0.6% from 207,171 in 2025), indicating slightly intensified competition; Beijing Forestry University is located in Beijing, which has strong regional appeal.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering the continuous backward trend in historical rankings, the significant 54.4% enrollment expansion in 2026 easing competition, the slight 0.6% increase in Physics Category candidates in the province, and the sustained appeal of the university's 211 status and Beijing location, based on the 2025 baseline ranking of 17846, the minimum ranking for 2026 is expected to significantly shift backward to about 23618, with a range of 23118–24118.

major_tier_recommendation_en.overall_advice: Predicted ranking is about 23618, with a range of 23118–24118. It is recommended that candidates within this range focus on Tier 2 majors as the main choice, aim for Tier 1 majors as a stretch, and use Tier 3 majors as safety options; candidates significantly better than the lower bound of the range (e.g., within 23000) can focus on competitive majors like Computer Science and Electronic Information; candidates near the upper bound (around 24000) should prioritize Tier 3 majors and pay attention to admission opportunities brought by the expansion.

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plan
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum ranking for the liberal arts group (history category) was approximately 2084 → 1777 → 2710 → 2532 → 2481, showing significant fluctuations overall, with a slight forward shift in 2021–2022, a notable backward shift in 2023, and stabilization in the last two years; the baseline ranking for 2025 is about 2481; the university's enrollment plan for the liberal arts group in Guizhou Province was 8 students in 2021–2022, 9 in 2023, 10 in 2024, and 12 in 2025; the 2026 plan increases to 15 students, an increase of 3 students (+25%) compared to 2025, marking the fourth consecutive year of expansion, which will ease competitive pressure and push the minimum ranking number backward.

学校层次与声誉.title: University Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: Beijing Forestry University is a 211 Project and Double First-Class university; in the 2026 Soft Science China University Rankings, it ranks 83rd, with a stable ranking range of 74–85 in recent years, placing it at the upper-middle level nationally; the 2026 reputation evaluation is somewhat negative, involving public opinion related to teacher ethics and conduct; Douyin popularity ranking is 51st (relatively popular), with medium-to-high short video exposure; in 2024, there was an abnormal signal in the Shaanxi liberal arts admission line (dropping sharply from 2000 to 10000), but no obvious gap records were seen in the Guizhou liberal arts group; Landscape Architecture is an A+ discipline (top in the country), consistent with the university's forestry and agriculture characteristics, but the liberal arts group enrollment majors (Law, Applied Psychology, Business Administration, Natural Geography and Resource Environment, Agricultural and Forestry Economics and Management) have low correlation with the A+ discipline.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: In 2026, the total number of regular college entrance exam takers in the province is about 299,000, with approximately 90,597 history category students (an increase of 0.6% from 90,087 in 2025), leading to slightly intensified competition; Beijing Forestry University is located in Beijing, with strong regional appeal.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering the stabilization of historical rankings in recent years, the 25% expansion in 2026 easing competition, a 0.6% slight increase in history category students in the province, and the sustained appeal of the university's 211 status and Beijing location, based on the 2025 baseline of 2481, the minimum ranking for 2026 is expected to shift slightly backward to about 2823, with a range of 2323–3323.
